overall.description: Cinematic game footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a muddy town street at night. The scene transitions from clear night to stormy conditions with lightning and heavy rain, featuring detailed wooden frontier architecture and atmospheric gas lamp lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: Western town main street with wooden frontier buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dry muddy main street of a Western town at night, passing wooden buildings with gas lamps

multi-story wooden building with balconies and warm interior lighting
cast iron street lamps emitting warm yellow light along the road
muddy unpaved street with wagon tracks and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a dry dirt road in a Western town at night, flanked by wooden buildings with glowing windows and gas street lamps. The atmosphere is calm and clear, with warm artificial lighting contrasting against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: Western town street opening to fields with storm approaching

events.description: lightning strikes in the sky and heavy rain begins to fall, changing the weather from clear to stormy

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the street as rain begins to fall and the street opens up to fields on the right

entered.detail: old wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the side of the road
simple wooden fence marking the boundary of the town

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the weather suddenly changes with a lightning strike and heavy rain begins to fall. The street opens up on the right to reveal open fields beyond a wooden fence, while a wooden wagon appears parked on the left side of the muddy road.

scene_state.functional_zone: Western town street with undertaker shop and wooden sidewalks

agents.ego_description: walking past the undertaker building and continuing down the rainy street, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: standing on the porch of the undertaker building, partially obscured by shadows

entered.detail: wooden building with prominent UNDERTAKER sign and covered porch with hanging plants

segments.scene_description: In the heavy rain, the character approaches and passes an undertaker's shop with a visible sign, where an NPC stands on the porch. The wooden buildings continue along the left side while the right side remains darker with distant trees visible, maintaining the stormy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet Western town that transforms from a clear, calm night into a violent rainstorm. It begins with a character walking down a dry dirt road flanked by wooden buildings and glowing gas lamps under a dark blue sky. As the character progresses, a sudden lightning strike triggers a downpour of heavy rain, turning the road muddy and opening the view to fields beyond a wooden fence and a parked wagon. The scene then shifts further down the street as the camera passes an undertaker's shop where an NPC stands on the porch. Finally, the movement continues past the remaining wooden structures on the left while the right side fades into a dark, stormy landscape of distant trees.
